member.name: P:UnityEditor.ShaderGraph.Internal.KeywordDependentCollection`7.baseInstance
member.summary: All permutation will inherit from base's active fields

member.name: M:UnityEditor.ShaderGraph.CreateShaderGraph.CreateFromTemplate(System.Action{System.String},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Prompts the user to create a new Shader Graph from a Template. /// The Template Browser opens if is null.
member.param: Callback to execute with the created shader graph asset.
Shader Graph template file. Use string.Empty for Blank Shader Graph.
New Shader Graph filename.

members.member:
Prompts the user to create a new Shader Graph from a Template and associated Material. The Template Browser opens if is null.
Callback to execute with the created material. Shader Graph template file. Use string.Empty for Blank Shader Graph. /// New Shader Graph filename.

member.name: T:UnityEditor.ShaderGraph.Drawing.IShaderInputObserver
member.summary: This interface is implemented by any entity that wants to be made aware of updates to a shader input

member.name: M:UnityEditor.ShaderGraph.GraphUtil.SanitizeName(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Sanitizes a supplied string such that it does not collide with any other name in a collection.
member.param: A collection of names that the new name should not collide with.

The format applied to the name if a duplicate exists. This must be a format string that contains `{0}` and `{1}` once each. An example could be `{0} ({1})`, which will append ` (n)` to the name for the n`th duplicate.
The name to be sanitized.
member.returns: A name that is distinct form any name in `existingNames`.

member.name: T:UnityEditor.ShaderGraph.MinimalGraphData
member.summary: Minimal version of used for gathering dependencies. This allows us to not deserialize all the nodes, ports, edges, groups etc., which is important as we cannot share data between and . The latter must always import fully, but for the former we want to avoid the extra GC pressure.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.ShaderGraph.ShaderStageExtensions.TryGetShaderStage(UnityEditor.ShaderGraph.ShaderStageCapability,UnityEditor.ShaderGraph.ShaderStage@)
member.summary: Tries to convert a ShaderStageCapability into a ShaderStage. The conversion is only successful if the given ShaderStageCapability refers to exactly 1 shader stage.
member.param: The ShaderStageCapability to convert.
If refers to exactly 1 shader stage, this parameter will contain the equivalent ShaderStage of that. Otherwise the value is undefined.
member.returns: True is holds exactly 1 shader stage.

member.name: T:UnityEditor.ShaderGraph.IMaterialSlotSupportsLiteralMode
member.summary: Literal mode says that the property being passed to a slot / node is a literal This is used if the node internally has a conditional statement that produces a texture reference. In these situations, the shader compiler requires the value being used for the switch / if to be known at compile time.

members.member: Cached run-time information for slot dependency tracking within a sub-graph

member.name: T:UnityEditor.ShaderGraph.ITerrainSubTarget
member.summary: Sub-target used to filter Terrain-specific nodes

member.name: M:UnityEditor.ShaderGraph.BlackboardInputInfo.#ctor(System.Single,System.String)
member.summary: Provide additional information to provide the blackboard for order and name of the ShaderInput item.
member.param: Priority of the item, higher values will result in lower positions in the menu.
Name of the item. If null, the class name of the item will be used instead.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.Graphing.GraphObject.materialArtifact
member.summary: The Material artifact generated by the import process. Every modification to this material will be lost when the graph is saved. for.

member.name: T:UnityEditor.Rendering.Fullscreen.ShaderGraph.FullscreenShaderGUI
member.summary: The base class to implement the fullscreen Material GUI in a render pipeline.

member.name: T:UnityEditor.Rendering.Fullscreen.ShaderGraph.FullscreenShaderGUI.Expandable
member.summary: Enum used to store the expanded state of the drawer in the material GUI

member.name: F:UnityEditor.Rendering.Fullscreen.ShaderGraph.FullscreenShaderGUI.Expandable.SurfaceOptions
member.summary: Surface Option key for the MaterialHeaderScopeList.RegisterHeaderScope call

member.name: F:UnityEditor.Rendering.Fullscreen.ShaderGraph.FullscreenShaderGUI.Expandable.SurfaceInputs
member.summary: Surface Inputs key for the MaterialHeaderScopeList.RegisterHeaderScope call

member.summary: Surface Option header name

member.summary: Surface Inputs header name

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Rendering.Fullscreen.ShaderGraph.FullscreenShaderGUI.OnGUI(UnityEditor.MaterialEditor,UnityEditor.MaterialProperty[])
member.summary: Unity calls this function when it displays the GUI. To implement your custom GUI, override this function..
member.param: Material editor instance.
The list of properties in the inspected material(s).

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Rendering.Fullscreen.ShaderGraph.FullscreenShaderGUI.OnOpenGUI(UnityEngine.Material,UnityEditor.MaterialEditor,UnityEditor.MaterialProperty[])
member.summary: Unity calls this function when it displays the GUI. To implement your custom GUI, override this function..
member.param: Material editor instance.
The list of properties in the inspected material(s).
The target materials for this GUI.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Rendering.Fullscreen.ShaderGraph.FullscreenShaderGUI.AssignNewShaderToMaterial(UnityEngine.Material,UnityEngine.Shader,UnityEngine.Shader)
member.summary: Assign a new FullscreenShader to the target material.
member.param: A valid material using a Fullscreen Shader Graph.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Rendering.Fullscreen.ShaderGraph.FullscreenShaderGUI.DrawSurfaceOptions(UnityEngine.Material)
member.summary: Draw the Surface Options section of the fullscreen shader GUI.
member.param: A valid material using a Fullscreen Shader Graph.

member.summary: Draw the Surface Inputs section of the fullscreen shader GUI.
member.param: A valid material using a Fullscreen Shader Graph.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Rendering.Fullscreen.ShaderGraph.FullscreenShaderGUI.ValidateMaterial(UnityEngine.Material)
member.summary: Ensures that the material is correctly setup.
member.param: A valid material using a Fullscreen Shader Graph.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Rendering.Fullscreen.ShaderGraph.FullscreenShaderGUI.SetupSurface(UnityEngine.Material)
member.summary: Setup the fullscreen shader keywords from the material properties.
member.param: A valid material using a Fullscreen Shader Graph.
